instructions: Keep the reporting person at the exact location where the child was last seen.
Notify nearest security guard or usher immediately.
Collect child name, age, clothing, guardian contact, last seen location, and time.
Call first aid or medical dispatch immediately.
Do not move the person unless there is immediate danger.
Keep crowd away and assign one volunteer to guide medical staff.
Collect symptoms, location, and consciousness/breathing status.
Use accessible gates A and B.
Guide wheelchair users away from high-crowd gates.
policies.contactLocation: ADA Assistance Kiosk at Gate A

instructions: Redirect fans away from crowded gates.
Escalate if crowd pressure is rising.
Never tell volunteers to physically push or block fans.
